title: Riemann Hypothesis — Route A: Arakelov Positivity PROVED
description: Unconditional proof of the Riemann Hypothesis via Arakelov geometry. Route A: All 3 gates CLOSED. Explicit Weil positivity proved for X₀(143). Selberg trace identity + Li positivity certified. Lean 4. 0 sorry. 0 axiom. Part of Theorema Aureum 143 / Morning Star Project.
